name: Listen 360
description:
What Listen360 Does?

Listen360 is an NPS-based customer engagement and local marketing platform that provides various features to help enhance the customer experience and amplify your online presence. 

‍

Source: Listen360

‍

Features:

➡️ Collect and manage valuable customer feedback efficiently.

➡️ Gain deep insights into customer behavior and preferences.

➡️ Enhance customer retention with effective loyalty solutions.

➡️ Measure and improve customer satisfaction with NPS tracking.

Benefits:

⭐️ Easily gather feedback from your customers to understand their experiences and areas for improvement.

⭐️ Monitor customer feedback in real-time, enabling prompt responses and quick issue resolution.

⭐️ Gain valuable insights into customer behavior and preferences to make data-driven decisions.

⭐️ Measure customer satisfaction and loyalty using NPS, providing a clear metric for business performance.

⭐️ Send automated surveys to customers, ensuring consistent feedback collection without manual effort.

⭐️ Manage feedback and insights across multiple locations from a single platform, ideal for franchises and chains.

⭐️ Seamlessly integrate Listen360 with other business systems and tools to streamline operations and improve efficiency.

Pros:

✅ Ease of integration

✅ Great feedback from customers 

✅ Removes the middlemen by sending out quick emails and SMS to clients which helps in touching base with them 

Cons:

❌ Does not integrate with certain CRM software 

❌ Creating customized reports is very difficult

❌ Customer Support is slow at times

❌ Platform is limited to customer engagement only, missing out on other features

‍

Offers Custom Pricing Options For Different Services
what_people_say:
Likes:
“Listen360 is very helpful in finding out what our member's thoughts and feedback are. It gives them a platform to voice their thoughts in a different way than stopping by the desk to talk to someone. It also gives us the opportunity to address concerns on a one-on-one basis and help the members to really feel heard.”

‍

Dislikes:

“I wish it would send a handful of positive comments to the users, in addition to the task pad. I think it can really beat down on the staff when they are sent negative feedback. They have to actively seek out positive feedback, so it would be nice if there was an email that was a more positive experience for them. It's tough for them to open an email and already know it's going to be negative.”

‍

*Review sourced and cited through G2*

‍
